exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your job transition forward
items: Conduct a comprehensive skills audit by listing all your technical abilities, soft skills, and achievements from the past 3 years
Research and document 5-7 target companies or organizations where you would want to work, including their mission, culture, and recent news
Create a detailed personal brand statement that clearly defines your professional value proposition in 2-3 sentences
Set up a professional LinkedIn profile optimization by updating your headline, summary, and adding relevant keywords from 3 job postings in your target field
Schedule and complete informational interviews with 3 professionals currently working in your target role or industry
Create a comprehensive 30-60-90 day transition timeline with specific milestones and deadlines for your job search activities
